Amazing views • dock space • dog friendly

Lake views, cabin charm, modern comfort.

Lake Hopatcong Cabin offers the feel of nature without giving up the essentials. Enjoy sweeping lake views, private-use access to the entire home, a full kitchen, central AC, washer/dryer, internet, a wood stove, and outdoor space made for meals, sunsets, and weekends by the water.

The stay

A warm log-cabin feel, beautiful water views, and outdoor spaces that make the property feel like a true lake retreat.

Amenities guests care about

Built for comfortable short stays with the right balance of lake access, practical convenience, and memorable outdoor living.

Amazing views

Large windows, elevated decks, and beautiful views over Lake Hopatcong from inside and out.

Full kitchen

Cook indoors or grill on the top deck while enjoying the scenery.

Modern comforts

Central AC, internet, large TV, washer/dryer, and a full bathroom.

Lake access included

Guests have lake access and dock space. Boat slip may be available for boats 25 feet or less with prior approval.

Family-ready options

Pack & play and/or high chair can be made available upon request.

Dog friendly

Dogs up to 25 lbs are welcome for a small additional fee.

Property details

  • Property: Lake Hopatcong Cabin
  • Location: 49 S Lakeside Ave, Jefferson, NJ
  • Sleeping layout: Two bedrooms with queen beds, plus a futon upstairs and a full sectional
  • Guest access: Guests have use of the entire home
  • Outdoor extras: Lake access, dock space, grill, deck seating, and wood stove

Important notes

  • Steps: The home sits up 68 steps, so it is not ideal for guests who dislike stairs.
  • Shared area: Dock space and the lower lakeside space are shared with the owner, who uses the detached garage and does not reside onsite.
  • Boat slip: Available for boats 25 feet or less with prior approval.
  • Pet policy: Dogs up to 25 lbs accepted for a small fee.
  • By request: Pack & play and/or high chair may be available.

Frequently asked questions

Clear answers help guests know right away whether the property is the right fit.

How many guests can stay? The cabin is best suited for up to 5 guests.
Are pets allowed? Yes. Dogs up to 25 lbs are welcome for a small additional fee.
Is there lake access and dock space? Yes. Lake access is included, and dock space is available. A boat slip for boats 25 feet or less may also be available with prior approval.
Anything guests should know before booking? Yes. The home is up 68 steps. The lower lakeside area and dock space are shared with the owner, who uses the detached garage but does not live onsite.
